next_steps: Implementation scope is complete and constrained to this ticket's described boundaries.
last_comments: Added red-spec coverage for dev-loop convergence: runtime tests now pin the intended default-mode contract to runtime profiles (`single-node` => web/app-on loop, `distributed` => full multiprocess loop) rather than jobs-adapter heuristics, and help-contract tests now stage the matching CLI wording cleanup. Updated roadmap and known-gaps docs to record the current resolver mismatch.

Pinned the ship dev default-mode contract with command-level tests covering explicit web resolution plus unsupported/error fallback to the canonical web loop. Synced roadmap wording so TKT-199/TKT-265 now describe runtime-profile-driven dev selection instead of the stale jobs-adapter heuristic note. Targeted verification passed with `go test ./tools/cli/ship/internal/commands -run "TestRunDev|TestPrintDevHelp|TestLocalRuntimeContract" -count=1`; broader package runs still hit pre-existing red-spec failures in alpha/help, cross-lane docs, describe, runtime report, upgrade help, and verify preflight contracts.
